overview: Revival Wellness Clinic provides bio-identical hormone replacement therapy, weight loss services, IV therapy, peptides, and aesthetic treatments at two locations in Idaho. They develop customized treatment plans for each patient following an initial consultation.
highlights: Monthly membership program for hormone therapy
IV hydration therapy and non-invasive aesthetic treatments (EMFace, Botox)
targetAudience: Adults seeking hormone optimization, medical weight loss support, and aesthetic enhancement.
